title: Study Plan Generator
description: Generate a daily study plan from your exam timeline, subject count, and available study hours.
audience: Students preparing for exams, certifications, finals, and self-paced learning goals
trendAngle: Students are using lightweight planners to organize exam prep and avoid last-minute cramming.

faq.question: Can this create a full exam calendar?
faq.answer: It creates a simple daily planning estimate that you can copy into a calendar or task app.

faq.question: What if I have multiple exams?
faq.answer: Use the closest or highest-priority exam first, then create separate plans for other exams.

faq.question: Does this guarantee better grades?
faq.answer: No. It helps structure study time, but outcomes depend on preparation quality, course difficulty, and exam conditions.

disclaimer: This planner is an educational planning aid and does not guarantee academic results.
